source: Dialog text only from day-1, day-2 content modules listed in docs/conversation-word-posts.json
normalization: Case-insensitive; curly apostrophes normalized to straight apostrophes; punctuation excluded; accented words count as one word.
annotation: Default senses come from docs/word-sense-defaults.json. Context-sensitive words use post-level sense-overrides.json files keyed by message index and token index.
hierarchy: Per-post study files live in docs/conversation-word-data/<post-id>/conversation-word-counts.json and conversation-word-senses.json.

examples: They have nice beaches and good food.

For sure. I'll keep in touch and tell you all about my adventures.
Yes, in the south of Brazil. I heard that people there speak very fast.
Fair enough, but I won't focus too much on the language at first, just a few words.
Yes, and it's colder in the south.

it_place_reference.notePt: Retoma Lagoa da Conceição como lugar.
examples: Nice! Is it a lake or a neighborhood, or is it one of those places where everything blends together?
It is both. There is a lagoon connected to the sea and a neighborhood around it, with hills, small streets, restaurants, and people walking everywhere.
Did it feel quiet, or was it busy even though you were close to the water?

it_object_reference.notePt: Retoma a ideia ou informação que foi confundida.
examples: I see. I got it mixed up with other South American countries, then.
I've never heard of it. I can't wait to know more!

it_weather_dummy.notePt: Em frases sobre clima, it funciona como sujeito gramatical.
examples: Hmm, do you think it will snow?
They did, but the cashier answered so fast that I only smiled, paid, and repeated obrigado like it was my safest word.

to_infinitive.notePt: Antes de verbo, to forma o infinitivo: to see, to send, to know.
examples: What nice things are you expecting to see there?
Wow, I wish I could go too! Don't forget to send photos!
I've never heard of it. I can't wait to know more!

to_connection.notePt: Indica conexão: connected to the sea.
examples: It is both. There is a lagoon connected to the sea and a neighborhood around it, with hills, small streets, restaurants, and people walking everywhere.
I'm fine. I'll travel to Florianópolis this month.

to_distance_reference.notePt: Em close to the water, indica proximidade.
examples: Did it feel quiet, or was it busy even though you were close to the water?

to_phrase_looking_forward.notePt: Parte fixa da expressão looking forward to; por isso o verbo seguinte usa -ing.
examples: Is there any local food you're looking forward to trying?
Did it feel quiet, or was it busy even though you were close to the water?
What did you do first, after you arrived and started looking around the area?
Did you practice Portuguese with anyone there, or did you mostly point, smile, and hope for the best?

did_substitute_verb.notePt: Substitui o verbo da pergunta anterior: they did = eles entenderam.
examples: They did, but the cashier answered so fast that I only smiled, paid, and repeated obrigado like it was my safest word.

do_default.grammarPt: Auxiliar usado em perguntas no passado.
examples: Did you practice Portuguese with anyone there, or did you mostly point, smile, and hope for the best?
